hero.description: Boutique law firm specializing in Public, Tax and Administrative Law. High-level legal counsel for individuals, companies and public sector institutions.

firma.p1: Torres & Rodas Abogados is a boutique law firm based in Cuenca, Ecuador, founded by two partners with decades of experience in the public sector and legal academia. Our practice is defined by technical depth, unwavering professional ethics, and a strategic focus on our clients' interests.
firma.p2: We work with national and international companies, government entities, oversight bodies and individuals who require high-level legal representation in tax, administrative and public law matters.
firma.p3: Our institutional background — as former officials at the Tax Attorney General's Office, the State Comptroller General and CELEC EP — gives us a unique perspective to anticipate scenarios, design strategies and deliver results.
firma.value1Desc: Focused on Public, Tax and Administrative Law. We are not generalists — we are leading references in our fields.
firma.value2Desc: Our experience within the public sector gives us an unmatched strategic advantage in every case.
firma.value3Desc: Both partners are university professors, guaranteeing up-to-date, rigorous knowledge of current law.
firma.value4Desc: Each client works directly with the founding partners. Your case will never be delegated without direct supervision.

areas.area1Desc: Tax planning, disputes before the SRI, administrative appeals and tax litigation. Representation before the District Tax Court and the National Court.
areas.area2Desc: Advice on public procurement, administrative acts, appeals, hierarchical remedies and administrative litigation for public and private entities.
areas.area3Desc: Constitutional consulting, legality control, State-company relations, energy sector regulatory framework and Ecuadorian state oversight bodies.
areas.area4Desc: Defense in civil and administrative liability proceedings before the Comptroller General. Preventive advice on public management and accountability.
areas.area5Desc: Legal structuring for companies operating in the public sector. Regulatory due diligence, normative compliance and institutional legal risk management.
areas.area6Desc: Workshops, seminars and legal training programs in tax law, administrative law and compliance for companies and public sector institutions.

equipo.intro: Torres & Rodas has two founding partners with strong careers in the public sector, academia and private practice — a combination that makes all the difference for our clients.

david.name: Dr. David Fernando Torres Rodas
david.cred4: Former Provincial Director of the Comptroller
david.cred5: Former Deputy Comptroller General of the State

tiberio.name: Dr. Tiberio Torres Rodas
tiberio.cred2: Professor — Universidad de Cuenca & Universidad del Azuay

proceso.step1Desc: We assess your legal situation confidentially, identify risks and opportunities, and determine whether we are the right team for your case.
proceso.step2Desc: We conduct a thorough analysis of the facts, applicable regulations and relevant case law to design the most effective strategy.
proceso.step3Desc: We execute the legal plan with precision, keeping you informed at every stage with clear and timely communication.
proceso.step4Desc: We monitor progress and adapt our strategy to any regulatory or procedural changes, always protecting your interests.
